mapper.select: SELECT b.id, b.user_id, b.seat_id, b.space_id, b.booking_date, b.start_time, b.end_time, b.status, b.cancel_reason, s.seat_number, sp.name as space_name, u.username as user_name, u.real_name as user_real_name, u.student_id as user_student_id FROM booking b LEFT JOIN seat s ON b.seat_id = s.id LEFT JOIN space sp ON b.space_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.id = #{id} AND b.deleted = 0

SELECT b.id, b.user_id, b.seat_id, b.space_id, b.booking_date, b.start_time, b.end_time, b.status, b.cancel_reason, s.seat_number, sp.name as space_name, u.username as user_name, u.real_name as user_real_name, u.student_id as user_student_id FROM booking b LEFT JOIN seat s ON b.seat_id = s.id LEFT JOIN space sp ON b.space_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.booking_date = #{date} AND b.seat_id = #{seatId} AND b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.start_time ASC

SELECT b.id, b.user_id, b.seat_id, b.space_id, b.booking_date, b.start_time, b.end_time, b.status, b.cancel_reason, s.seat_number, sp.name as space_name, u.username as user_name, u.real_name as user_real_name, u.student_id as user_student_id FROM booking b LEFT JOIN seat s ON b.seat_id = s.id LEFT JOIN space sp ON b.space_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.space_id = #{spaceId} AND b.booking_date = #{date} AND b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.seat_number ASC, b.start_time ASC

SELECT b.id, b.user_id, b.seat_id, b.space_id, b.booking_date, b.start_time, b.end_time, b.status, b.cancel_reason, s.seat_number, sp.name as space_name, u.username as user_name, u.real_name as user_real_name, u.student_id as user_student_id FROM booking b LEFT JOIN seat s ON b.seat_id = s.id LEFT JOIN space sp ON b.space_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON b.user_id = u.id WHERE b.user_id = #{userId} AND b.booking_date = #{date} AND b.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.start_time ASC

SELECT DATE(booking_date) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM booking WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(booking_date) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT DATE(booking_date) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM booking WHERE deleted = 0 AND booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(booking_date) ORDER BY date ASC
SELECT s.seat_number FROM seat s LEFT JOIN space sp ON s.space_id = sp.id WHERE sp.name = #{spaceName} AND s.deleted = 0 AND sp.deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.seat_number ASC

SELECT DATE(booking_date) as date, COUNT(*) as count FROM booking WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND deleted = 0 AND booking_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(booking_date) ORDER BY date ASC
